question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not enumerate the main sections or chapters of the thesis. It only presents an introduction and background information, so the reader cannot identify the thesis structure from this passage.

question: Description
feedback: There is no brief description of what each chapter or section will cover. The passage focuses on the problem statement and literature review, but it does not outline the contents of individual sections.

feedback: The overall structure of the thesis is not evident from this text. While it contains an introduction and some background, it lacks a clear outline or roadmap that shows how the thesis will be organized.
